title: DONATIONS - 211info
text: RIGHT 2 DREAM TOO DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of camping gear (tents and sleeping bags), clothing (socks, underwear, shoes, men’s and women’s apparel), bedding (pillows and blankets), toiletries (soap, shampoo, conditioner, toothbrushes, toothpaste, deodorant, body wipes), food (cooked or uncooked), and operational supplies (55-gallon trash bags, paper plates, plastic cutlery). Cash or check donations can be made onsite to support utility and material needs; receipts are available at the front desk. Financial donations may also be mailed to the registered office or made online. Also advocates for policies addressing homelessness and offers volunteer opportunities. 999 N Thunderbird Way Portland, OR 97227 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Saturday 8am-10pm Email Get Directions Visit Website Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or walk in for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Any Photo ID AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Near the Rose Quarter transit center and directly across from the Moda Center's stop on the MAX Yellow Line Services: Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Camping Gear Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs Food Donation Programs Homelessness Advocacy Groups Personal/Grooming Supplies Donation Programs Volunteer Opportunities * Homelessness Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - SHORT-TERM SLEEPING AREA If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. RIGHT 2 DREAM TOO
